scripts.test: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:lite: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test -c playwright.lite.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:inline: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test --reporter=line
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test ./e2e --reporter=line
scripts.test:unit: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && playwright test -c playwright.unit.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:source-guards: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && playwright test -c playwright.source.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:integration:signing: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=1 playwright test -c playwright.integration.config.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:threshold-ed25519:active-path: playwright test -c playwright.relayer.config.ts ./relayer/link-device.prepare.test.ts ./relayer/email-recovery.prepare.test.ts --reporter=line && playwright test -c playwright.scripts.config.ts ./unit/thresholdEd25519.separatedRoles.script.unit.test.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:signers:gates: pnpm -C ../packages/sdk-web run build:prepare && USE_RELAY_SERVER=0 playwright test ./unit/walletSessionReadiness.gate.unit.test.ts ./unit/thresholdEcdsa.commitQueue.unit.test.ts ./unit/walletIframeHost.signTempoCancel.unit.test.ts ./wallet-iframe/router.behavior.concurrent.test.ts --reporter=line
scripts.test:signer-parity: pnpm run test:signer-parity:rust && pnpm run test:signer-parity:web-wasm-replay
